I attended WTM last November.
We signed a new contract in Portugal.
I went on a fam trip to Porto.
Did you meet any new suppliers?
Andrea! Welcome back. How did the trip to Portugal go?
It turned out great! I visited six hotels and did a full inspection of each one.
Impressive. Did you manage to negotiate good rates?
I did. The contract negotiation was tough, but we agreed on a fifteen percent commission.
That is a great deal. What was the biggest challenge?
The schedule, we drove four hundred kilometers in three days. But I ended up with three new partners.
Three partners in one trip? That is a real achievement.
Thank you! The whole outcome was better than I ever expected.
Last November, I attended a big fair in London.
The highlight was signing a new contract.
The biggest challenge was the tight schedule.
In the end, it turned out better than expected.
I ended up with three new partners.

Hi Andrea, it is Ricardo. I wanted to tell you how the trip to Portugal went last week. Honestly, it turned out even better than I expected. We visited six hotels in three days, and I did a full inspection of each one. The highlight was a small property near Porto with amazing rates for next season. The negotiation was tough at first, but in the end we signed a great contract with a fifteen percent commission. The biggest challenge was the schedule, because we drove almost four hundred kilometers, but it was worth it. I ended up with three new partners for our itineraries. Give me a call when you are free, and I will send you all the details.

Good afternoon, everyone. Before we finish for the week, I want to share a quick recap of the fair. Overall, it was a real success. Our team held more than forty meetings, and we met several new tour operators from Europe. The highlight was the panel on sustainable travel, which gave us many fresh ideas. We faced one big challenge: two of our biggest suppliers could not attend, so we rescheduled those meetings for next month. Even so, the outcome was excellent. We ended up with eight strong leads and two signed contracts. Thank you all for your hard work, and please send me your trip reports by Friday.
